sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: First Horizon Corporation Reports Advance In Q4 Income
feed.summary: First Horizon Corporation (FHN) announced a significant increase in its fourth-quarter profit, with net income totaling $956 million, or $1.87 per share, compared to $738 million, or $1.36 per share, in the prior year. Excluding certain items, adjusted earnings were $968 million or $1.89 per share. The company also reported a 7.2% rise in revenue to $3.420 billion from $3.190 billion last year.

feed.title: Aramark Healthcare+ Redefines Healthcare Dining with Farm to Chef Program
feed.summary: Aramark Healthcare+ is transforming healthcare dining by launching its innovative Farm to Chef Program. This initiative aims to enhance patient and staff well-being through fresh, locally sourced ingredients and chef-prepared meals. The program reflects a commitment to improving the quality and sustainability of food services in healthcare settings.

feed.title: Keysight Technologies stock hits all-time high at 214.69 USD
feed.summary: Keysight Technologies (KEYS) stock recently reached an all-time high of $214.69, demonstrating strong investor confidence and marking a significant achievement for the company with a 29.43% increase over the past year. This surge is attributed to robust financial performance, growth prospects, and innovations, including advancements in non-terrestrial networks, AI software integrity, quantum computing partnerships, and AI-powered design tools.

feed.title: Energy giant ONEOK joins Barclays CEO forum on power and gas markets
feed.summary: ONEOK (NYSE: OKE), a leading midstream operator, announced its participation in the Barclays CEO Energy-Power Conference on September 4-5, 2024. Management will engage in a fireside chat on September 4 at 2:25 p.m. ET, which will be webcast live and available for replay. The company's latest investor materials are also available online, highlighting its extensive pipeline network and role in delivering vital energy products.

feed.title: Truist Securities Adjusts Price Target for Expeditors International (EXPD)
feed.summary: Truist Securities has increased its price target for Expeditors International (EXPD) to $160.00 from $130.00, while maintaining a 'Hold' rating. This adjustment by analyst Lucas Servera reflects evolving expectations for the company's performance. The article also provides a summary of recent historical analyst ratings for EXPD from other firms, showcasing diverse perspectives within the analyst community.

feed.title: HP stock hits 52-week low at $20.64 By Investing.com
feed.summary: HP Inc. (HPQ) stock recently hit a 52-week low of $20.64, reflecting a 33.85% decline over the past year due to a challenging market, shifting consumer preferences, and supply chain disruptions. Despite this, the stock trades below its fair value, boasts a P/E ratio of 7.84, and offers a substantial 5.78% dividend yield, having paid dividends for 55 consecutive years. Analysts have downgraded HP, citing ongoing PC market pressures and rising memory prices, while HP Inc. unveiled new AI-era laptops and a separate entity, HPQ Silicon Inc., secured $1 million in funding.

feed.title: €36.49 Fastenal (FAS.DE XETRA) ahead of 15 Jan 2026 earnings: expect guidance move
feed.summary: Fastenal Company (FAS.DE) shares are trading at €36.49 on XETRA ahead of its earnings report on January 15, 2026, which is expected to be a key catalyst. Analysts anticipate modest EPS growth and revenue of $2.05 billion. Meyka AI gives FAS.DE a "BUY" grade with a one-year price target of €44.07, suggesting a 20.78% upside.

feed.title: Hershey unveils new dream candy combos ahead of Valentine’s Day
feed.summary: Hershey is launching five new candy products and bringing back its Snoopy & Friends collection for Valentine's Day 2026. This move is part of the company's broader strategy to boost growth through innovation and a focus on its expanding salty snack segment, despite facing challenges like cocoa shortages, rising costs, and shifting consumer habits. Analysts remain cautiously optimistic about Hershey's future, foreseeing a potential recovery in earnings per share as cocoa costs moderate and pricing strategies take effect.

feed.title: NYSE Content Advisory: Pre-Market Update + NYSE to List U.S. Options for Benchmark MSCI Indexes in 2026
feed.summary: The New York Stock Exchange (NYSE) provides a daily pre-market update and announced a new agreement with MSCI to list U.S. options on MSCI benchmark indexes on NYSE Arca and NYSE American starting in 2026. The pre-market update highlighted TSM's strong performance driven by AI demand, and upcoming NYSE Live will feature insights from ICE President Chris Edmonds. The article also touches on events like the celebration of Truth Social Funds' launch and Carlisle Companies' 66 years of trading.

feed.title: Wells Fargo Initiates Coverage on American Financial Group With Overweight Rating, $165 Price Target
feed.summary: Wells Fargo has initiated coverage on American Financial Group (AFG) with an "Overweight" rating and set a price target of $165. This news was published on January 15, 2026, at 09:43 am EST, according to MT Newswires. American Financial Group is an insurance holding company specializing in property and casualty insurance, particularly in commercial products.

feed.title: NCL announces Norwegian Aura – its largest & longest ship yet
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line (NCL) has unveiled details for the Norwegian Aura, its largest and longest ship to date, set to debut in Europe in May 2027 before homeporting in Miami in June 2027. The vessel will be 1,130 feet long, accommodate 3,840 guests, and feature Ocean Heights, an innovative open-air activity complex with new waterslides and attractions. It will offer Caribbean voyages calling at NCL's private destinations, Harvest Caye and Great Stirrup Cay, and boasts expanded amenities like larger pool decks and more suites.

feed.title: Travelers (TRV) Partners with Anthropic to Boost AI Capabilities
feed.summary: Travelers (TRV) has announced a strategic partnership with Anthropic to enhance its AI capabilities in engineering and analytics, aiming to empower 10,000 employees with customized AI assistants. This collaboration is designed to optimize software development, analytics, and machine learning models, ultimately improving risk assessment, customer experience, and operational efficiency. Despite robust financial performance and strong institutional ownership, the company's valuation presents a mixed picture with its P/E ratio near a five-year low and P/S ratio near a five-year high, while insider selling activity raises some caution.

feed.title: Hilton stock reaches all-time high at 304.44 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Hilton Worldwide Holdings Inc. (HLT) stock has surged to an all-time high of $304.44, marking a 23.33% increase over the past year. The company boasts a market capitalization of nearly $70 billion and a gross profit margin of 77.52%. Despite a high P/E ratio, Hilton maintains strong financial health and is expanding its offerings with a new "Apartment Collection by Hilton" lodging category slated for 2026.

feed.title: Raymond James To Acquire Clark Capital Management Group
feed.summary: Raymond James announced an agreement to acquire Clark Capital Management Group, Inc., a Philadelphia-based asset management firm with over $46 billion in assets. Clark Capital will maintain its brand and operate as an independent boutique investment manager within Raymond James Investment Management post-acquisition, which is expected by Q3 2026. This acquisition aims to enhance Raymond James Investment Management's offerings and strengthen its position in key advisor-focused channels.

feed.title: Jabil Circuit stock hits all-time high at 249.82 USD By Investing.com
feed.summary: Jabil Circuit's stock reached an all-time high of $249.82, marking a 54.45% increase over the past year due to strong investor confidence and solid performance. The company's recent surge is backed by robust earnings reports, strategic acquisitions, and positive analyst recommendations, despite its high P/E ratio. Jabil's "Intelligent Infrastructure" revenue growth and acquisition of Hanley Energy Group highlight its strategic efforts to strengthen market position and financial performance.

feed.title: Raymond James to Acquire Clark Capital Management Group
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial (RJF) has announced an agreement to acquire Clark Capital Management Group, an asset manager with over $46 billion in assets. Clark Capital will maintain its brand and operations as an independent entity within Raymond James Investment Management, enhancing Raymond James's advisor-centric offerings. The acquisition is expected to close by Q3 2026, subject to regulatory approvals.

feed.title: RBC Raises Price Target on Ball Corp. to $67 From $63, Keeps Outperform Rating
feed.summary: RBC Capital Markets has increased its price target for Ball Corp. (BLL) to $67 from $63, while maintaining an "Outperform" rating on the stock. This adjustment reflects analyst confidence in the company's future performance. The news comes amid several analyst updates for Ball Corp. in early January, including both upgrades and downgrades from other financial institutions.

feed.title: CP Finalizes Key Labor Agreements with U.S. Unions
feed.summary: Canadian Pacific Kansas City (CP) has successfully ratified 16 collective bargaining agreements with multiple U.S. unions, impacting approximately 700 employees across several states. These five-year deals include wage increases, with two additional tentative agreements pending ratification for electricians. The article also provides an overview of CP's market position, financial health, valuation, and risk assessment, highlighting its robust revenue growth and strong profitability metrics despite some financial stress indicated by an Altman Z-Score of 2.05.

feed.title: KeyCorp Forecasts Rubrik's Q3 Earnings (NYSE:RBRK)
feed.summary: KeyCorp expects Rubrik (NYSE:RBRK) to report Q3 2027 EPS of ($0.35) and maintains an "Overweight" rating with a $95 target price. This comes after Rubrik recently surpassed estimates with $0.10 EPS and revenue of $350.2M, though its FY2026 guidance remains negative. Insider selling activity has been noted, while institutional investors have increased their stakes in the cloud data management and security company.

feed.title: Zacks Research Issues Pessimistic Estimate for ITW Earnings
feed.summary: Zacks Research has lowered its Q3 2027 EPS estimate for Illinois Tool Works (ITW) to $3.10, indicating a pessimistic outlook, with the full-year consensus at $10.39. This comes amidst broader negative analyst sentiment, including a "Sell" rating from Goldman Sachs, and an average "Reduce" rating for ITW on MarketBeat. Despite this, ITW shares trade near $259.93, and the company announced a quarterly dividend of $1.61.

feed.title: Altria Group, Inc. (MO): A Bull Case Theory
feed.summary: This article summarizes a bullish thesis on Altria Group, Inc. (MO), highlighting its strong free cash flow, high margins, and strategic growth in the oral tobacco segment, particularly with On! nicotine pouches. Despite declining traditional cigarette volumes and regulatory risks, Altria is presented as an undervalued investment with a significant margin of safety and a durable economic model. The thesis suggests potential for re-rating as the market recognizes the company's stable income and growth trajectory.

feed.title: SPY ETF Daily Update, 1/15/2026
feed.summary: The SPDR S&P 500 ETF Trust (SPY) saw a 0.54% gain in pre-market trading, driven by strong quarterly results from Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing (TSM) that boosted tech stocks. Despite recent net outflows of $4 billion over five days, retail sentiment for SPY is positive, while hedge funds have reduced their holdings in the last quarter. Key catalysts for the week include major bank earnings reports from Goldman Sachs (GS) and Morgan Stanley (MS), alongside speeches from Federal Reserve officials Michael Barr and Philip Jefferson, which could influence market direction and rate expectations.

feed.title: Caterpillar’s 30% Payout Ratio Shows Why Its Dividend Can Survive the Next Recession
feed.summary: Caterpillar (NYSE: CAT) has increased its annual dividend to $6.04 per share, marking 15 consecutive years of increases. The company's conservative 30% earnings and 37% free cash flow payout ratios demonstrate its ability to maintain dividends even during significant economic downturns. Caterpillar has a history of never cutting its dividend, successfully navigating both the 2008 financial crisis and the 2020 pandemic.

feed.title: Earnings call transcript: BlackRock’s Q4 2025 beats expectations with strong revenue growth
feed.summary: BlackRock Inc. (BLK) exceeded Q4 2025 earnings and revenue forecasts, reporting an EPS of $13.16 and revenue of $7 billion, driven by strong iShares ETF inflows and robust growth across its platform. The company saw a 23% year-over-year revenue increase and a 10% dividend hike, with plans for $1.8 billion in share repurchases in 2026. BlackRock is focusing on expanding into private markets, leveraging technology like Aladdin, and growing its presence in international markets to sustain its upward trajectory, as highlighted by CEO Lawrence Fink and other executives during the earnings call.

feed.title: Western Digital stock hits all-time high at 221.5 USD
feed.summary: Western Digital Corporation's stock has reached an all-time high of $221.50, and is trading even higher at $224.50, reflecting a 341.94% increase over the past year. The company boasts a market capitalization of $73.5 billion and 75.22% revenue growth, with analysts maintaining positive ratings and increasing price targets. Recent developments include a strategic investment in quantum computing company Qolab and ongoing strong demand in the data storage industry.

feed.title: Union Pacific discusses merger benefits at rail shippers meeting
feed.summary: Union Pacific (NYSE: UNP) met with customers to discuss its proposed merger with Norfolk Southern, aiming to create America's first transcontinental railroad and introduce more competition. Despite opposition, the company highlights benefits like faster service and reduced costs, with a commitment to preserving union jobs. Recent corporate activities include a quarterly dividend, plans for a new industrial park, and changes to its Board of Directors, while analysts have adjusted ratings due to merger uncertainty.

feed.title: Coherent Corp. Launches Sapphire XT: A Compact Mid-Power Laser Platform for Advanced Life Science Applications
feed.summary: Coherent Corp. has introduced Sapphire XT, a new compact mid-power visible laser platform leveraging Optically Pumped Semiconductor technology. This innovative system delivers 1W output at 488nm, 532nm, and 561nm, is over 50% smaller, and twice as powerful as previous models, meeting the demands of advanced life sciences and semiconductor applications. Its integrated design and compatibility with the Coherent OBIS XT platform simplify system complexity and enable multi-wavelength solutions, positioning Coherent as a leader in photonics.

feed.title: Truist names Mark Cuccinello as new head of structured credit By Investing.com
feed.summary: Truist Financial Corporation has appointed Mark Cuccinello as its new Head of Structured Credit, overseeing Asset-Based Lending, Working Capital Solutions, and Equipment Finance businesses. Cuccinello joins from JPMorgan Chase and will focus on advancing Truist's structured credit strategy by enhancing collaboration with corporate and commercial banking teams. This appointment is part of Truist's ongoing investment in its Wholesale Banking platform, complementing recent strategic moves like a new share repurchase program.

feed.title: Adicet Bio (ACET) Price Target Increased by 1,210.53% to 101.59
feed.summary: The average one-year price target for Adicet Bio (ACET) has significantly increased by 1,210.53% to $101.59 per share, up from the prior estimate of $7.75. This revised target is an average of analyst estimates ranging from $18.18 to $151.20, representing an 1,125.48% increase from its last closing price of $8.29. Institutional ownership in ACET remains high at 72 funds, holding 52,987K shares, and a bullish put/call ratio of 0.07.

feed.title: Q&A | Nordics represent the gold standard for digital infrastructure: Brittany Kaiser, CEO, AlphaTON Capital
feed.summary: Brittany Kaiser, CEO of AlphaTON Capital, discusses the company's expansion into the Nordics, highlighting Sweden's attraction due to its renewable energy, data protection, and stable government. AlphaTON Capital focuses on building privacy-centric AI infrastructure, utilizing AtNorth's sustainable data centers for decentralized AI computing within the Telegram ecosystem. Kaiser emphasizes decentralization for resilience, compliance with stringent European data laws as a competitive advantage, and the company's plans for AI-as-a-Service with a focus on confidential computing.

feed.title: Why BofA Just Turned Neutral on Arm Holdings plc (ARM)
feed.summary: BofA recently downgraded Arm Holdings plc (ARM) to 'Neutral' from 'Buy' with a $120 price target, citing concerns over a potential dip in global smartphone units due to high memory costs and supply issues impacting ARM's Client royalty sales. The analyst also noted worries about the enhanced SoftBank contribution and limited visibility into ARM's new CPU chipset/silicon business, despite the firm's confidence in smartphone and data center v9/CSS adoption. This downgrade follows a nearly 3% stock decline after Arm Holdings announced a restructuring to create a Physical AI unit, separating its operations into Cloud and AI, Edge, and Physical AI segments.

feed.title: Truist Financial Forecasts Strong Price Appreciation for C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) Stock
feed.summary: Truist Financial has increased its price target for C.H. Robinson Worldwide (NASDAQ:CHRW) to $190 from $165, maintaining a "buy" rating, indicating a potential upside of over 10%. This comes after the transportation company beat EPS estimates but saw a revenue decline. Other firms like Evercore and Barclays have also raised their price targets, contributing to a "Moderate Buy" consensus rating for CHRW.

feed.title: Raymond James to acquire $46B Clark Capital Management
feed.summary: Raymond James announced its acquisition of Philadelphia-based Clark Capital Management Group, a firm with $46 billion under management. The acquisition is expected to close in the third quarter of this year, though the purchase price was not disclosed. Clark Capital will maintain its separate brand and leadership, joining Raymond James Investment Management as one of several "boutique" brands.

feed.title: JPMorgan Adjusts Price Target on CMS Energy to $81 From $80, Maintains Overweight Rating
feed.summary: JPMorgan has increased its price target for CMS Energy (CMS) from $80 to $81, while reaffirming an Overweight rating on the stock. This adjustment comes amidst other analyst revisions for CMS Energy, with Barclays adjusting its target to $74 from $82 and BMO Capital setting its target at $80 from $85, both maintaining Overweight and Outperform ratings respectively. CMS Energy specializes in producing and distributing electricity and natural gas, primarily within the United States.

feed.title: Jefferies raises Textron stock price target to $115 on growth outlook
feed.summary: Jefferies has increased its price target for Textron (NYSE:TXT) stock from $95.00 to $115.00, maintaining a Buy rating ahead of the company's upcoming earnings report. The new target suggests a 22% upside from the current price. Textron is set to release its Q4 earnings and 2026 guidance on January 28, which will be the first guidance under new CEO Lisa Atherton.

feed.title: Norwegian Aura Unveiled, Sailing June 2027 From Miami
feed.summary: Norwegian Cruise Line has unveiled the Norwegian Aura, their longest and largest vessel, which is now open for sale. This new ship will homeport in Miami starting June 2027 for week-long sailings, following its European debut in late May 2027. Key features include the multi-level "Ocean Heights" activity zone with multiple waterslides and a ropes course, an extended "Ocean Boulevard" promenade, and the largest pool deck in the fleet, along with 1,976 staterooms including 30% more suites in The Haven.

feed.title: Smartphone-size 1W laser for sharper microscopes and chipmaking tools
feed.summary: Coherent (NYSE: COHR) has launched the Sapphire XT, a compact 1W visible laser platform utilizing Optically Pumped Semiconductor (OPS) technology. This new laser system, comparable in size to a smartphone, delivers 1W output at 488nm, 532nm, and 561nm, doubling performance while reducing size by over 50% compared to previous models. The Sapphire XT is designed to meet the demands of advanced life science applications like super-resolution microscopy and DNA sequencing, as well as emerging quantum sensing, holography, and semiconductor applications.

feed.title: Sapphire XT: Coherent’s New Compact 1W Visible Laser Platform Sets a New Standard for Life Science and Semiconductor Innovations
feed.summary: Coherent Corp. has launched Sapphire XT, a new compact 1W visible laser platform built on its Optically Pumped Semiconductor (OPS) technology. This system, with its smartphone-sized footprint, offers twice the performance and over 50% size reduction compared to previous models, making it suitable for advanced life science and semiconductor applications. Its integrated design and intrinsic modulation capabilities simplify integration and reduce costs, addressing the growing demands for higher resolution, throughput, and reliability in these fields.

feed.title: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP) Declares Quarterly Dividend of $1.70
feed.summary: Automatic Data Processing, Inc. (NASDAQ:ADP) announced a quarterly dividend of $1.70 per share, payable April 1st to shareholders of record on March 13th, representing a 2.6% yield and an annualized payout of $6.80. The company has a consistent history of dividend increases and a sustainable payout ratio of 62.5%. Additionally, ADP's board approved a $6.0 billion share repurchase program, indicating confidence in the stock's value, following a strong earnings report of $2.49 EPS and $5.18 billion in revenue.

feed.title: Citigroup Earnings: Could This Time Really Be Different? Targets Look Achievable
feed.summary: Citigroup reported strong fourth-quarter 2025 earnings and reiterated ambitious 2026 targets, leading Morningstar to increase its fair value estimate for the stock. Analysts believe the bank can achieve these goals by rolling off transformation and severance expenses, coupled with strong loan and deposit growth. The efforts by CEO Jane Fraser to simplify the business and improve returns have been noted as significant positives.

feed.title: Marsh & McLennan Companies, Inc. (NYSE:MMC) to Issue Quarterly Dividend of $0.90
feed.summary: Marsh & McLennan Companies, Inc. (NYSE:MMC) has declared a quarterly dividend of $0.90 per share, payable to shareholders on February 13th, with an ex-dividend date of January 29th. This dividend represents a 2.0% annual yield and is well-covered by earnings, with the company consistently raising its dividend for 15 consecutive years. Analysts forecast the company to maintain a strong payout ratio, supported by anticipated earnings of $10.48 per share next year.

feed.title: Union Pacific Shares Vision, Sets Record Straight at Midwest Association of Rail Shippers Winter Meeting
feed.summary: Union Pacific (UNP) addressed customers at the Midwest Association of Rail Shippers meeting to clarify details and benefits of its proposed merger with Norfolk Southern. The company emphasized that the transcontinental railroad will offer faster, more reliable, and lower-cost service, backed by extensive analysis and support from 2,000 customers and officials. Union Pacific aims to enhance competition, strengthen the U.S. supply chain, and provide job protection for union employees through this end-to-end merger.

feed.title: AMTD, Owner of L'Officiel and AMTD IDEA Brands, Launches Litigation against Jalou Family for Malicious Falsehood, Defamation, and Consequential Loss and Damage
feed.summary: AMTD Group, AMTD IDEA Group, AMTD Digital Inc., and The Generation Essentials Group have jointly announced legal action against Mr. Benjamin Eymere of the Jalou Family for defamation and misconduct. AMTD is seeking to correct baseless allegations regarding its L'Officiel and AMTD IDEA brands and emphasizes that the 2022 acquisition of L'Officiel was fully completed with 100% of the purchase price paid, with the company currently having no debt. They assert that the Jalou family was not the controlling shareholder at the time of acquisition and have made formal reports to law enforcement regarding Mr. Eymere's actions.

feed.title: ManageEngine Is Named a Challenger in the 2026 Gartner® Magic Quadrant™ for Endpoint Management Tools, scoring above 4/5 across all 4 Use Cases
feed.summary: ManageEngine has been named a Challenger in the 2026 Gartner Magic Quadrant™ for Endpoint Management Tools, scoring above 4 out of 5 across all four Critical Capabilities Use Cases. The company was also recognized as a Leader in the IDC MarketScape: Worldwide Unified Endpoint Management Software 2025–2026 Vendor Assessment and as the only vendor to be named Customers’ Choice in the 2025 Gartner Peer Insights™ Voice of the Customer for Endpoint Management Tools. These recognitions highlight ManageEngine's continued innovation in endpoint management through its Endpoint Central platform, which integrates management, security, and digital employee experience workflows to deliver greater automation and operational efficiency.

feed.title: 'Points Choice' live soon for Royal, Celebrity, Silversea loyalists
feed.summary: Royal Caribbean Group is rolling out "Points Choice" for its loyalty club members across Royal Caribbean International, Celebrity Cruises, and Silversea. Starting with sailings on January 30, members can direct their earned loyalty points to the brand of their preference, regardless of which brand they sailed on, strengthening their status or exploring other brands. This initiative follows the company's status match program from May 2024 and was first announced by Chairman/CEO Jason Liberty last October.

feed.title: Raymond James Financial Inc to Acquire Clark Capital Management Group
feed.summary: Raymond James Financial Inc. announced its agreement to acquire Clark Capital Management Group, which manages over $46 billion in assets. The acquisition is expected to close by Q3 2026, pending approvals, with Clark Capital operating as an independent boutique under Raymond James. This deal aims to enhance Raymond James' wealth planning offerings and drive growth in advisor-focused channels.

feed.title: Is There Still Value In NRG Energy (NRG) After Its Strong Five Year Share Price Run?
feed.summary: This article analyzes whether NRG Energy (NRG) still offers value after its significant share price gains over the past five years. Using Discounted Cash Flow (DCF) analysis and Price-to-Earnings (P/E) ratio comparisons, Simply Wall St suggests that NRG Energy appears undervalued. The article also introduces a "Narratives" feature on their platform for community-driven valuation insights.

feed.title: BD budgets $110M to expand Neb. syringe production
feed.summary: Becton Dickinson (BD) is investing $110 million to expand its prefillable syringe production plant in Columbus, Nebraska, in response to growing demand for GLP-1s and other biologic drugs. The project will introduce manufacturing of BD’s Neopak glass prefillable syringes to the facility, create 120 new jobs, and is expected to begin supplying by mid-2026. This expansion aligns with BD's broader commitment to invest over $2.5 billion in U.S. manufacturing upgrades over the next five years.

feed.title: J&J builds case for earlier Tecvayli use in multiple myeloma
feed.summary: Johnson & Johnson is building evidence to support the earlier use of its multiple myeloma drug, Tecvayli, with data from the MajesTEC-9 trial showing a 40% reduction in mortality risk and 71% improvement in progression-free survival in patients with one to three prior lines of therapy. This data, along with results from the MajesTEC-3 study, will be used to seek approval for Tecvayli in second-line or later treatment, aiming to expand its market beyond its current fifth-line or later approval in the US and fourth-line in the EU. J&J projects Tecvayli could become a $5 billion annual product if its label is expanded, further emphasizing the company's goal towards improved survival rates and potentially a "functional cure" in multiple myeloma.

feed.title: O’Reilly Auto Parts World of Wheels is rolling back to the BJCC, Jan. 30 – Feb. 1
feed.summary: The 55th Annual O’Reilly Auto Parts World of Wheels Custom Auto Show is returning to the Birmingham-Jefferson Convention Complex (BJCC) from January 30 to February 1. The event will feature hundreds of custom cars, race cars, hot rods, and motorcycles, along with celebrity appearances, stunts, and family-friendly activities. Tickets are available at O'Reilly Auto Parts stores or at the gate, with discounted prices for children and adults who purchase in advance.
